action_choice_hints: The action cell is adjacent to an existing structure of a particular role.
The action cell is aligned in a straight line with multiple cells of a specific role.
The action cell is not blocked by obstacle roles in any direction relevant to the task.
The action cell is positioned such that extending a structure from it would not intersect with forbidden roles.
The action cell is chosen only if a target role is present somewhere in the grid.
The action cell is selected based on its proximity to a reference object of a particular role.
feature_family_hints: Local neighborhood role patterns: Needed to determine if the action cell is adjacent to or surrounded by specific roles.
Line/contiguity features: Required to capture whether the action cell extends or aligns with an existing structure.
Obstacle avoidance features: Necessary to check if the action cell or its extensions would intersect with forbidden roles.
Relative position features: Needed to express the spatial relationship between the action cell and reference objects.
Existence features: To determine if certain roles are present anywhere in the grid, affecting action eligibility.
